team_name: TenderProof — AI Tender Evaluation with Criterion-Level Explainability and Immutable Audit Trail
summary: Design an AI-based technical platform for government procurement tender evaluation and eligibility analysis, providing explainable evaluation reports with an immutable audit trail.
key_steps: Compile the Tender into a Typed Evaluation Schema
optimization_claims: Eliminates significant accuracy degradation in OCR on scanned inputs
Eliminates hallucination risk in the final decision
Actively detects bid rigging and shared credential fraud
